name: libb-hooks-op-check-perl
title: libb-hooks-op-check-perl
summary: Perl wrapper for OP check callbacks
description:
Perl wrapper for OP check callbacks
B::Hooks::OP::Check provides an interface for XS modules to hook into the
callbacks of PL_check, which is part of perl's core. It allows a C function to
be invoked as the last stage of optree compilation, depending on the given op
code number (op_type).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libb-hooks-op-check-perl because Perl wrapper for OP check callbacks.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libb-hooks-op-check-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libb-hooks-op-check-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libb-hooks-op-check-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
